name: show_objects
short_description: Show objects in Find Results view
full_help:
show_objects

Description: 
Show objects in Find Results view

Syntax: 
show_objects  [-name <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose] <objects>

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-name]     Tab title
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <objects>   Objects to show Find Results view

Categories: 
GUIControl

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
